iteration_0_baseline.notes: Original verbose skill unchanged. sql-query lost points on schema (CSV import header row included as data).

iteration_1.notes: Rewrote skill focused on SQLite. sql-query: fixed schema but top_customer saved as object not string. sql-migrate: model created tables via CLI then Python script tried to recreate them causing crash.

iteration_2.notes: Fixed JSON format guidance and normalization approach. sql-query: customer_rank truncated to 2 of 5 entries (model wrote JSON manually instead of using Python).

iteration_3_final.notes: Added strong guidance to use Python for all JSON output. Confirmed with second run: 100/100 on both tasks.

changes_made: Stripped PostgreSQL, MySQL content — focused entirely on SQLite
Added explicit CSV import procedure with --skip 1 to handle header rows
Added detailed JSON output format rules (scalar vs array-of-strings vs array-of-objects vs dict)
Added Python pattern for JSON generation with row[0]/row[1] indexing instead of dict(row)
Emphasized using single Python script for normalization (not mixing CLI and Python)
Added CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS guidance to prevent duplicate table errors
Strongly discouraged manual JSON writing via write tool — must use Python to avoid truncation
